title: cirsium parryi subsp. viridiflorum
intro: Cirsium parryi subsp. viridiflorum, also known as the Green-flowered thistle or Plume thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cirsium parryi subsp. viridiflorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions.
